description: Fullstack Software Engineer specializing in Unity 3D Game Development and Web Development. I design and develop interactive 3D mechanics and scalable web solutions. With hands-on experience in C#, Unity Engine, React.js, and Node.js, I bridge the gap between immersive game design and robust full-stack web applications. Currently pursuing a Bachelor's in CS at PIEAS.

education.degree: Bachelor of Computer and Information Sciences
education.institution: Pakistan Institute of Engineering and Applied Sciences, Islamabad
education.details: Relevant Courses: OOP, DSA, Software Engineering, Algorithm Analysis, Calculus, Linear Algebra, Intro to AI, Intro to Computer Vision, Databases.
